EAT
Uploader
Aug 5, 2016
1,348
160,821
May 12, 2024
  • Add bookmark
  • #1


Overview:
Life can't get any better!
You're living in the big city but your dreams meet a sudden halt when you're forced to move back home to save your fathers bath house business.
The bath house is located on top of a high mountain, it's filled with many strange guests.​

Thread Updated: 2026-06-11
Release Date: 2026-06-11
Aliases: Bubbles and Sisters
Developer: Bubbles and Sisters - Subscribestar - Itch.io - Discord - Steam - Ream
Censored: No
Version: 0.16
OS: Windows, Linux, Android
Language: English
Development Thread: Link
Genre:
2DCG, Incest, Animated, Creampie, Milf, Glory hole, Oral sex, Big tits, Big ass, Adventure, Exploration, Mobile game, Rpg, Sandbox, Teasing, Voyeurism, Vaginal sex, Male protagonist, AI (backgrounds)

Installation:
1. Extract and run.

Changelog:
v0.13 & v0.14 & v0.15 & v0.16
N/A

v0.12
Scenes:
  • Lisa in the shower scene
  • Jack working with books
  • Emma crushing Jack with her boobs
  • Spying on Serenity
Improvments:
  • New grandma art
  • New flower art
  • New backgrounds and art for the shower scenes (we're still missing a second emma shower scene here)
  • Audio leveling—I've balanced all the voice lines so they should be at consistent volume now. I think I caught all the lines that were supposed to be whispers but ended up too loud, but please let me know if you notice any volume spikes.

v0.11
Scenes:
  • New Emily scene, who was behind the notes?
  • New Emma scene, struggling in the reception
  • A short new guest scene (wipe the picture in the Foyer then go outside the barn at night)
Backgrounds:
  • Emily's secret hideout in the barn
  • The extra room/Vine room now has it's own background too
Other improvements:
  • Improved Sarah leaning against the bar art
  • New Beccy art (check out her new thighs!)
  • Bug fixes and dialogue fixes as usual
This is what you missed in version 0.10

Scenes:
  • Emma's adventure + animation
  • Emma at home
Older scenes:
  • New backgrounds for Sarah's sex/bj
  • New backgrounds and animation for Emily riding in your bed
  • New background for Emily glory hole 2
  • New backgrounds and phone for Delilah phone scene
  • Improved train station intro
  • Updated John Hawthorne scene
Backgrounds:
  • Nail salon
  • Bathroom
Quality of life fixes:
  • Improved Main menu UI
  • Added shadows to Jack
  • New Emma hotel sprite
  • New John Hawthorne sprite

v0.10
New scenes:
  • Emma adventure + animation
  • Emma at home
Older scenes:
  • New backgrounds for Sarah's sex/bj
  • New backgrounds and animation for Emily riding in your bed
  • New background for Emily glory hole 2
  • New backgrounds and phone for Delilah phone scene
  • Improved train station intro
  • Updated John Hawthorne scene
Backgrounds:
  • Nail salon
  • Bathroom
Quality of life fixes:
  • Improved Main menu UI
  • Added shadows to Jack
  • New Emma hotel sprite
  • New John Hawthorne sprite

v0.9
Scenes
1. Lisa in bed
2. Lisa taking a selfie
3. Lisa/Emily in kitchen
4. Daniel in his room
5. Emma in the bath
6. MC Cleaning the bath house

Voice acting
I've sadly had to replace Emily's voice actor but I think you guys will love the new one. We've gone through and remade all of her scenes with the new voice!
I've also gone through and improved all of Lisas audio. I hope you can tell a difference.
Added missing voice acting for a Serenity scene.

Added interactive elements
The computer in the reception will be clickable for a short scene.
Added a framed old newspaper in the foyer that you can click.

Quality of life updates
Improved the audio on the UI
Changed the order of the intro - the MC adventure in the start is now on day 2 making the UI tutorial and start flow better.
Fixed some narration, dialogue and spelling
A bunch of bug fixes, guide improvement

Backgrounds
Mc room
Foyer
Family side
Employee side
Bunch of upcoming nature backgrounds

v0.8
Art & Animations
  • We gave the intro a nice makeover - especially that magic cave, New backgrounds, animations, the works
  • Added new backgrounds to the house
  • The yoga scenes with Lisa got some new art (still putting on the finishing touches)
  • One spicy new Lisa animation
  • 2 new animations for the Delilah bj scene
  • Added an Emily bath scene (This is not a quest so you got to find her in the bath)
  • Sarah's got a new bar scene
  • Some small but sweet UI updates
Hidden
  • There's a tiny wooden figure hidden somewhere... happy hunting!

v0.7
Major Updates:
  • Completely remade character sprites for Jack, Emily, and Serenity
  • Redesigned Lisa's main yoga artwork
  • Improved intro with new artwork/animations
  • Added more to early scenes:
- Lisa's introduction
- Emily's introduction

UI Overhaul:
Redesigned all main interfaces:
  • Main menu and Settings
  • Load/Save screens
  • Map and Location system
  • Time of day display - Gallery
  • Phone interface
New Content:
  • 2 fully voice acted guests
  • Sir Templeton the cat
  • 3 environmental interactions

v0.6 Public
Backgrounds! We've hired 2 background artists who are finally going to get the BGs right. The game currently looks like Frankenstein's monster, but hopefully everything will be replaced in the next version. You'll see many new backgrounds in this version, all with 3 different times of day.

Gallery! We've finally added the gallery!

Voice Acting!
  • Added all of Lisa's VA in the game (except for one scene)
  • Beccy is now in the game!
  • More Emma content
  • A tiny bit of missing Sarah content
Scenes!
  • Added a Lisa teaser/introduction scene at the start of the game
  • Added Emily's second NSFW scene
  • Added a short Emma scene
  • Added more to Emily's introduction
  • Added the missing Sarah animation for her night scene
Other stuff:
  • More bug fixes and improvements
  • Added Russian translation (including buttons) up to version 0.5

v0.5 Public
Scenes:
Delilah scenes
Sarah BJ animation
Short Emma scene
Lisa Scene
Daniel art

Backgrounds:
3 shower backgrounds
Spa Pool
MC room
Updated House Map (We're still working on the Map, its a placeholder and the character on the map aren't exactly centered...)

Voice acting:
Emma
Emily
Daniel
John Hawthorne
All of the dialogue up to version 0.3 is now in the game!

Other:
New Dialogue box
Improved scenes with better camera placement
Emily NSFW scenes

v0.41
Voice acting
These characters are fully voice-acted up to Version 0.3 content.

  • Lisa
  • Serenity
  • Old lady grandma
These characters each have one scene voice-acted for you to enjoy!

  • Sarah
  • Emily
  • Emma
New features:
Translations to 5 languages!
New sleep animation
Better UI
Bug fixes

New Scenes:
Misc Sarah scenes
Sarah Morning
Sarah My room
Sarah/MC/Daniel/John Scene
Serenity Selfie
New kitchen background
New Sarah room background

New Corridor (Right) background ( This can only be seen in a Sarah scene right now) We decided to shorten this update, which means two of Sarah’s scenes are not yet animated. Our animator was busy due to personal reasons, but we will add those animations in the next update.

v0.3
New scenes to look for:
  • Emma introduction (Reception)
  • Emma chair scene (Reception)
  • Emma introducing
  • Beccy & Delilah (Reception)
  • Emma / Lisa (Reception)
  • Emma bath (Spa)
  • Emma / Emily bath (Spa)
  • Emily / Lisa (Kitchen)
  • Emily selfie (Phone)
  • Serenity (My Room) Lisa (Showers)
Additional content:
  • 2 new backgrounds (Spa)
  • New Jack sprite at the start
  • Dialogue fixes
  • Bug fixes
  • ( If you're using an old save file, the guide won't be of much help since most of these scenes are not main quest scenes and will just appear by themselves - Keep looking at the map notifications instead )

v0.2
  • The family is now your real family and not step family
  • UI: added a Phone/Phone-conversations/Guide
  • 2 Sarah scenes + phone conversation
  • 2 Emily scenes (2 animations)
  • 1 Lisa scene
  • Some Daniel conversations
  • Bunch of bug-fixes

v0.1
Initial Release

Developer Notes:

Bubbles and Sisters is an adult sandbox visual novel.

Meet the girls, explore the bath house and save your fathers business all while having lots of sex!
The atmosphere in this game is warm, light hearted, fun and with a dash of mystery and magic!

  • The game features NO GRIND, NO STATS, NO MINI -GAMES
  • Simple tasks like talking to someone or looking through a door will NOT REQUIRE ENERGY
  • FAST TRAVEL MAP to quickly take you where you want
  • IN GAME GUIDE if you ever get lost.
The sandbox mode was chosen so that you can pick which characters you want to interact with and in what order.


The current version has
  • 4 main girls
  • 2 animated sex scene
  • 40 locations to explore inside the bath house
  • Lots of awkward situations to get into.
Upcoming verions will have
  • More animations
  • 4 new girls (with extremely varied body types)
  • A world map to explore

Code:
v0.14 -> cold
v0.16 -> cabin

DOWNLOAD
Win/Linux: BUZZHEAVIER - DATANODES - PIXELDRAIN - VIKINGFILE - MEGA
Mac: BUZZHEAVIER - DATANODES - PIXELDRAIN - VIKINGFILE - MEGA
Android: BUZZHEAVIER - DATANODES - PIXELDRAIN - VIKINGFILE - MEGA

Win/Linux: BUZZHEAVIER - DATANODES - MIXDROP - PIXELDRAIN - VIKINGFILE
Mac: BUZZHEAVIER - DATANODES - MIXDROP - PIXELDRAIN - VIKINGFILE
Android: BUZZHEAVIER - DATANODES - MIXDROP - PIXELDRAIN - VIKINGFILE

Others: Online
